The '''Nasirii''' [[Kajidic/Legends|kajidic]] was a [[Hutt/Legends|Hutt]] kajidic located on [[Tatooine/Legends|Tatooine]] which controlled most pleasure dens and entertainment on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]]. Like four other Hutt kajidics, the Nasirii controlled nearly one fifth of Tatooine's criminal activities before [[Jabba Desilijic Tiure/Legends|Jabba's]] rise to power.

[[Herogga]] was a member of this kajidic.

{{Stub}}
